summary: Invoice Creation with COGS/Logistics/Margin Calculation feature fully tested and working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified - Create Invoice button, dialog, SKU dropdown, line item calculation, form submission, success message with margin summary, and invoice list update.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/accounts/{account_id}/invoices - Creates invoice with 200 status
Backend: Invoice creation returns margin_summary with revenue, COGS, logistics, gross_margin, gross_margin_percent
Backend: GET /api/accounts/{account_id}/invoices - Returns invoices with line items including costs
Backend: COGS data exists for Hyderabad city (7 SKUs with total_cogs and outbound_logistics_cost)
Backend: COGS lookup correctly matches SKU name and city
Backend: Gross margin formula verified: revenue - COGS - logistics
Backend: Oceans Fresh Seafood account found (OCEA-HYD-A26-001) in Hyderabad
Frontend: Create Invoice button visible on Account Detail page
Frontend: Dialog opens with title 'Create Invoice for Oceans Fresh Seafood'
Frontend: Account City (Hyderabad) displayed with COGS note
Frontend: SKU dropdown shows all master SKUs (7 SKUs including Nyla variants, 24 Brand)
Frontend: Line items auto-calculate line_total (bottles × price_per_bottle)
Frontend: Create Invoice submission returns success toast with invoice number and margin
Frontend: New invoice appears in Invoice Summary list
Frontend: Invoice count badge updated (10 Invoices)
Frontend: Gross Value and Total Order Value updated after invoice creation
critical_code_review_comments: Backend invoice creation endpoint correctly fetches COGS data by city from cogs_data collection
Fallback COGS lookup implemented for SKUs not found in account's city
Line item costs calculated correctly: cogs_total = bottles × cogs_per_bottle, logistics_total = bottles × logistics_per_bottle
Invoice response includes margin_summary for immediate feedback to user
Frontend AccountDetail.js correctly implements invoice creation with handleCreateInvoice function
SKU dropdown populated from master SKU list via skusAPI.getMasterList()
calculateInvoiceTotal() in frontend correctly computes line totals
seed_data_creation: Multiple test invoices created during testing for account OCEA-HYD-A26-001 (Oceans Fresh Seafood). Test invoices: INV-20260304-0002 through INV-20260304-0007
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice creation feature fully implemented and working. Test account: Oceans Fresh Seafood (OCEA-HYD-A26-001) in Hyderabad. COGS data available for 7 SKUs in Hyderabad. Key data-testid: create-invoice-btn. Invoice dialog uses shadcn Select component for SKU dropdown. Success message shows invoice number and gross margin percentage.

verified_features.POST /api/accounts/{account_id}/invoices: Creates invoice with COGS, logistics, margin calculation
verified_features.GET /api/accounts/{account_id}/invoices: Returns invoices with line items including all cost breakdown
verified_features.Create Invoice button: Opens dialog on Account Detail page
verified_features.Success message: Shows invoice number and margin summary (e.g., 'Gross Margin: ₹1,201.8 (40.06%)')
verified_features.Invoice list update: New invoice appears in Invoice Summary after creation
